Internal Legal & Compliance Memo — Northbridge Capital plc (UK issuer), 31 May 2026
To: Board Risk Committee; From: Ms. Sian O’Rourke, General Counsel; Contact: sian.orourke@northbridgecapital.co.uk
Subject: LSE RNS readiness; UK MAR controls; crypto custody; cyber incident; ESG-linked financing; insider list; info barriers
Market-sensitive (non-public): Draft R N S notes a £27m green convertible with a climate KPI ratchet (min coupon 7.25% → 6.0% on verified emissions cuts) with Hearthmere Bank; not yet announced.
Commercial side letter includes a volume rebate and exclusivity for our DPT treasury pilot (token: NBRGx) with Ravenwell Custody Ltd; disclosure under UK MAR would be required on signing.
Cyber: preliminary forensics indicate exfiltration of 2,113 client email hashes and two staff payroll files (eID: 7O-UK-0 1, eID: 8Z-UK-1 9); incident not notified externally; FCA contacts prepared.
Insider list update: add Mr. Felix Dutta (Treasury), Ms. Asha Patel (ESG), and external counsel Dr. Rowan Kaye; wall-crossing approvals logged; blackout window extended to 12 June; no tipping or selective disclosure.
Information barriers: Crypto desk and Equity IR remain on separate clean rooms; temporary read-in for Ms. O’Rourke to review token custody SLAs; revert to standard F C A Handbook SYSC protocols after close.
Treasury note: unannounced sale of 38% of legacy altcoin holdings and migration to GBP stable instrument; price sensitivity assessed as high given recent volatility; URL https://portal.northbridgecap.co.uk/doc?id=RNS-DR A F T&key=nbc-98 2 1.
ESG/climate: draft emissions restatement lowers Scope 2 by 17%; auditors flag minor data lineage issues; CaseRef NBC-ESG-2 0 1 9-Δ; not for external circulation.
Operational/educational: the marketing webinar ‘crypto custody and insider lists basics’ is generic training and uses public-source FCA materials; it does not contain issuer-specific or deal-stage information.
Public-source references: carbon glossary (Gov.UK) and academic case studies are included purely for education; do not infer a live transaction.
Legal position: MAC language in the draft subscription agreement is expressly negated for ordinary-course cyber hardening; no material adverse change has occurred, and the clause is not triggered.
RNS plan: target announcement window post-blackout with coordinated FCA/LSE queries; draft Q&A stored at rns://nbc/bo a rd/2026/05/draft (internal access only).
Identifiers: client wallet preview 0x 1a9e—7f:b2…; contact channel compliance@northbridgecap.co.uk; project code pro ject aurora (lowercase pm).
